reasoning: After extensive searching, I found zero evidence that WorldAtlas.com has adopted "Gulf of America" or made any statements about adopting it before July 1, 2025. This is a very low-probability event given the compressed timeline and lack of any momentum toward adoption by WorldAtlas specifically.
